basic.question_text: 将 'A Bug''s Life' 的导演改为 'John Lasseter'。
basic.question_context: UPDATE movies SET director = 'John Lasseter' WHERE title = 'A Bug''s Life'; —— 注意字符串内的单引号用两个单引号。
basic.reference_sql: UPDATE movies SET director = 'John Lasseter' WHERE title = 'A Bug''s Life';
hints: UPDATE movies SET director = 'John Lasseter' WHERE title = ...
字符串内单引号写成两个：'A Bug''s Life'
UPDATE movies SET director = 'John Lasseter' WHERE title = 'A Bug''s Life';
basic.verification_sql: SELECT * FROM movies WHERE title = 'A Bug''s Life';

basic.question_text: 将 'Toy Story 2' 的上映年份改为 1999。
basic.question_context: UPDATE movies SET year = 1999 WHERE title = 'Toy Story 2';

UPDATE movies SET year = 1999 WHERE title = 'Toy Story 2';

basic.question_text: 将 'Toy Story 8'（如果存在）的标题改为 'Toy Story 3'，导演改为 'Lee Unkrich'。如果没有这条记录，创建它：先插入再更新。改为练习：将 'Toy Story' 的导演改为 'John Lasseter'。

intermediate.question_text: 把所有评分低于 7.5 的电影评分增加 0.5。
intermediate.question_context: UPDATE boxoffice SET rating = rating + 0.5 WHERE rating < 7.5;
intermediate.reference_sql: UPDATE boxoffice SET rating = rating + 0.5 WHERE rating < 7.5;

intermediate.question_text: 把 John Lasseter 导演的所有电影片长增加 5 分钟。
intermediate.question_context: UPDATE movies SET length_minutes = length_minutes + 5 WHERE director = 'John Lasseter';

intermediate.question_text: 将未分配建筑（building IS NULL）的员工分配到建筑 '1w'。
intermediate.question_context: UPDATE employees SET building = '1w' WHERE building IS NULL;
intermediate.reference_sql: UPDATE employees SET building = '1w' WHERE building IS NULL;
hints: UPDATE employees SET building = '1w' WHERE building IS NULL;

challenge.question_text: 使用子查询 UPDATE：将评分高于平均评分的电影的国内票房增加 10%。
challenge.question_context: UPDATE boxoffice SET domestic_sales = domestic_sales * 1.1 WHERE rating > (SELECT AVG(rating) FROM boxoffice);
challenge.reference_sql: UPDATE boxoffice SET domestic_sales = CAST(domestic_sales * 1.1 AS INTEGER) WHERE rating > (SELECT AVG(rating) FROM boxoffice);
hints: WHERE rating > (SELECT AVG(rating) FROM boxoffice)
UPDATE boxoffice SET domestic_sales = domestic_sales * 1.1 WHERE rating > (SELECT AVG(rating) FROM boxoffice);
UPDATE boxoffice SET domestic_sales = domestic_sales * 1.1 WHERE rating > (SELECT AVG(rating) FROM boxoffice);
challenge.verification_sql: SELECT * FROM boxoffice WHERE rating > (SELECT AVG(rating) FROM boxoffice);
